new_claims.claim_text: Behind-the-scenes footage of the Artemis II Mission was leaked, revealing it to be a film set.
new_claims.notes: Claim of a leaked video showing Artemis II as a film set, suggesting a fabricated event. Directly challenges trust in official narratives.

new_claims.claim_text: Israeli Air Force prepares to destroy Iran's electrical facilities as soon as fighting resumes.
new_claims.notes: Claim of Israeli military intent to target civilian infrastructure. Significant escalation if true.
